findings.description: The two leading bullet points at the top of the image ('最初に〇を書き、その後に関数名と()を書く' / '次に、処理を書く') are continuation text from the previous page. They are absorbed into the p361::1 definition body, which is acceptable — the content is faithfully conveyed.

Program example for 'definition and call' includes the trailing sentence '関数helloを定義して呼び出すと、以下のように出力される' but the actual output lines ('みなさん' / 'こんにちは') that appear below the box in the image are not shown — they likely continue on the next page. No error; the entity correctly notes output follows.

reviewer_notes: Page covers function definition syntax, a hello() definition program example, the 【ステップ2】関数の呼び出し section, the function-call term with 書式 (関数名()), and the combined definition+call program example. All 6 entities are present and accurately reflect the image. zh/en translations are correct. No high- or med-severity findings.
